_comment: Data source definitions for the Matter RAG pipeline. Each entry is fetched by fetch_node.
_comment2: Set role='pr' for PR/change content, role='test_plan' for reference documents, role='spec' for Matter spec docs, role='data_model' for Matter DM XML files.
_comment3: ${VAR} tokens are substituted from environment variables at runtime.
_comment4: Supported source types: github_pr, github_repo, github_tag_diff, local_folder, url, csv, matter_xml
_comment_github_repo: Use type='github_repo' to fetch test plan .adoc files directly from GitHub and save locally.

_comment_github_repo_example._note: Remove this entry from _comment and add to 'sources' array to activate

_comment_spec_example._note: Matter specification HTML/adoc documents. Feeds REQUIREMENT/BEHAVIOR_RULE nodes in the KG. Place spec files in data/matter_spec/ and add this entry to 'sources' to activate. extensions=['*'] processes every file in the folder.

_comment_test_plans_html_example._note: Matter test plan HTML/adoc documents. Feeds TEST_CASE nodes in the KG and test plan vector DB. Place test plan files in data/test_plans/ and add this entry to 'sources' to activate. extensions=['*'] processes every file in the folder. 'exclude' accepts fnmatch patterns matched against the filename (not full path). E.g. ['*interop*', 'DRAFT_*.html'] to skip interop booklets and draft files.

_comment_data_model_example._note: Matter DM XML files (CSA DevX format). Feeds canonical CLUSTER/ATTRIBUTE/COMMAND/EVENT/FEATURE nodes in the KG. Place XML files in data/data_model/ and add this entry to 'sources' to activate. Rebuild with --build-data-model.

_comment_url_html_example._note: Use format='raw_html' to preserve HTML headings so HTMLLoader can split into sections. Use format='html' (default) to strip tags and treat as plain text.

_comment_matter_diff_local_example._note: Drop appclusters_diff.html into data/raw/spec_diff/. The pipeline will expand it into one chunk per diff section. Optionally set matter_diff_cluster to restrict to a single cluster.

_comment_matter_diff_url_example._note: Use format='matter_diff' to fetch a live diff HTML page. The pipeline extracts diff sections (ADDED/REMOVED/CHANGED) and uses them for vector + KG search before the LLM report step. Set matter_diff_cluster to restrict to a single cluster (e.g. 'On/Off').

_comment_test_plans_adoc_folder_example._note: Raw .adoc test plan files to be updated in-place by write_updated_testplan_node. The pipeline replaces TC sections from update_candidates and appends new TC sections from missing_tests. Per-cluster output files are written to reports/updated_testplans_<timestamp>/. Place .adoc files in data/test_plans_adoc/ and add this entry to 'sources' to activate.
